detailed_description.heading: Heightened Clarity & Versatile Monitoring
detailed_description.text: Introducing the Ubiquiti AI Professional, a cutting-edge 4K IP camera designed for both indoor and outdoor applications. Its ultra-high 4K (8MP) resolution provides exceptional clarity and detail in surveillance footage, allowing for superior object and individual identification within the camera's field of view. This heightened pixel density ensures sharp and clear visuals, crucial for accurate identification and comprehensive analysis in surveillance scenarios. Experience the added advantage of 3x optical zoom, providing the flexibility to adjust the camera's focal length for versatile monitoring. The intelligent long-distance detection capabilities enhance the camera's effectiveness in identifying and monitoring subjects over extended distances, making it ideal for perimeter protection or traffic surveillance.

detailed_description.heading: AI-Powered People Detection
detailed_description.text: AI-powered people detection enables the camera to intelligently identify and track individuals, while license plate recognition adds a layer of security by identifying vehicles entering or leaving premises. Automated monitoring processes alert security personnel to the presence of individuals or specific vehicles, enhancing overall security in restricted access areas or parking lots. The camera's built-in IR LEDs and automatic IR filter ensure exceptional image quality, particularly during challenging low-light conditions. Infrared capabilities facilitate effective surveillance during nighttime or in low-light environments, providing adaptive imaging with automatic IR filters that adjust to changing light conditions. Beyond its surveillance capabilities, the Ubiquiti AI Professional introduces a realm of audio communication. An array of microphones enables two-way communication over extended distances, fostering a comprehensive security experience.

detailed_description.heading: Versatility in Surveillance Scenarios
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti AI Professional features a 1/1.8" 8MP sensor, which delivers unparalleled detail and clarity in surveillance footage, boasting a perfect balance between compactness and light-gathering ability. The focal range from 4.1 mm to 12.3 mm equips the camera with adjustable focal length, providing flexibility to capture scenes at varying distances. This versatility accommodates different scenarios, offering both wide-angle overviews and focused shots. Deployable for perimeter surveillance, this feature proves instrumental in monitoring large areas, combining wide-angle coverage with detailed close-ups. Experience enhanced control with the ƒ/1.53 - ƒ/3.3 aperture range, allowing for precise adjustment of light entering the camera. The variable aperture provides creative control over the depth of field, making it ideal for nighttime surveillance or scenarios with varying light levels. Employing H.264 compression, the Ubiquiti AI Professional ensures efficient video data processing. This compression standard optimizes bandwidth usage, reducing data transmitted over the network. Resulting in cost-effective long-term video storage, it seamlessly integrates into comprehensive networked surveillance systems where efficient data transmission is paramount. At a resolution of 3840 x 2160 pixels (16:9 aspect ratio) and a maximum frame rate of 30 FPS, the camera achieves high-resolution real-time monitoring. This combination guarantees detailed and smooth surveillance footage, crucial for accurate event analysis. Lastly, customize your surveillance experience with the Ubiquiti AI Professional, where adjustable image settings, including color, brightness, and sharpness, cater to specific monitoring requirements.

detailed_description.heading: Ideal for High-Traffic Areas
detailed_description.text: At the heart of the Ubiquiti AI Professional lies a powerful quad-core processor based on Arm® Cortex®-A53 architecture, showcasing its robust processing capabilities for intricate tasks, image processing, and advanced video analytics. This architecture ensures optimal performance, contributing to quick response times and smooth operation of the camera, particularly in high-traffic areas or applications requiring facial recognition and license plate recognition. Ensuring efficient data transfer, the camera features a Gigabit Ethernet (GbE) RJ45 port, supporting high-speed data transmission for smooth and high-quality video streaming without lags or delays. The integration of Power over Ethernet (PoE) simplifies its installation by allowing the camera to receive both power and data over a single Ethernet cable, reducing wiring complexity and enabling flexible placement.

detailed_description.heading: User-Friendly Maintenance
detailed_description.text: Enhancing its functionality in various lighting conditions, the camera is equipped with an LED illumination ring in R/G/B/W colors, providing additional lighting around the camera for improved visibility during nighttime surveillance. The adjustable brightness settings for the LED ring allow customization based on surveillance needs. For user convenience and maintenance, the camera features a factory reset button, allowing for a quick and straightforward reset to default settings in case of configuration errors or routine maintenance tasks. The camera's adaptability is further emphasized by its flexible mounting options, accommodating installation on walls, ceilings, or poles. The adjustable angles associated with these mounting options ensure optimal coverage of specific areas, making it suitable for deployment in varied environments where different mounting options are necessary, allowing for customized surveillance angles and coverage areas.
